---
name: selenium-pom
---

# Universal Selenium POM Instructions

1. Use the Page Object Model (POM) for structuring UI automation tests.
2. Implement a base page with common actions (wait, click, type, getText).
3. Organize page objects by generic features or screens.
4. Use flexible locators and explicit waits for stability.
5. Write end-to-end (E2E) tests using async/await or your language's async patterns.
